'''âh-h-b''' ('''kahahab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbreathe|imbreathe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbreathe|imbreathe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| kahahab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihahab|thihahab]] || [[word:jihahab|jihahab]] || [[word:shihahab|shihahab]] || [[word:kihahab|kihahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhahab|thuthuhahab]] || [[word:jujuhahab|jujuhahab]] || [[word:shushuhahab|shushuhahab]] || [[word:kukuhahab|kukuhahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhahab|thuhahab]] || [[word:juhahab|juhahab]] || [[word:shuhahab|shuhahab]] || [[word:kuhahab|kuhahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhahab|thuhahab]] || [[word:juhahab|juhahab]] || [[word:shuhahab|shuhahab]] || [[word:kuhahab|kuhahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehahab|thehahab]] || [[word:jehahab|jehahab]] || [[word:shehahab|shehahab]] || [[word:kehahab|kehahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohahab|thothohahab]] || [[word:jojohahab|jojohahab]] || [[word:shoshohahab|shoshohahab]] || [[word:kokohahab|kokohahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohahab|thohahab]] || [[word:johahab|johahab]] || [[word:shohahab|shohahab]] || [[word:kohahab|kohahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohahab|thohahab]] || [[word:johahab|johahab]] || [[word:shohahab|shohahab]] || [[word:kohahab|kohahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhahab|thĂŠhahab]] || [[word:jĂŠhahab|jĂŠhahab]] || [[word:shĂŠhahab|shĂŠhahab]] || [[word:kĂŠhahab|kĂŠhahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahahab|thathahahab]] || [[word:jajahahab|jajahahab]] || [[word:shashahahab|shashahahab]] || [[word:kakahahab|kakahahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahahab|thahahab]] || [[word:jahahab|jahahab]] || [[word:shahahab|shahahab]] || [[word:kahahab|kahahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahahab|thahahab]] || [[word:jahahab|jahahab]] || [[word:shahahab|shahahab]] || [[word:kahahab|kahahab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahahab|shahahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahahab|goshahahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahahab|gokishahahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahahabnĂŒ|shahahabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahahabnknĂŒ|goshahahabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahahabnĂŒ|gokishahahabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahahabshĂ«|shahahabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahahabnkshĂ«|goshahahabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahahabshĂ«|gokishahahabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahahabro|shahahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahahabnkro|goshahahabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahahabro|gokishahahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahabmu|shahahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahahabnkmu|goshahahabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahahabmu|gokishahahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahahabsher|shahahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahahabnksher|goshahahabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahahabsher|gokishahahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahahabng|shahahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahahabnkng|goshahahabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahahabng|gokishahahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahahabya|shahahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahahabnkya|goshahahabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahahabya|gokishahahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahahabyam|shahahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahahabnkyam|goshahahabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahahabyam|gokishahahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahahabnĂŒshĂ«|shahahabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahahabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahahabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahahabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahahabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahahabnĂŒro|shahahabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahahabnknĂŒro|goshahahabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahahabnĂŒro|gokishahahabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahabnĂŒmu|shahahabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahahabnknĂŒmu|goshahahabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahahabnĂŒmu|gokishahahabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahahabshĂ«nĂŒ|shahahabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahahabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahahabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahahabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahahabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahahabshĂ«ro|shahahabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahahabnkshĂ«ro|goshahahabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahahabshĂ«ro|gokishahahabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahabshĂ«mu|shahahabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahahabnkshĂ«mu|goshahahabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahahabshĂ«mu|gokishahahabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahahabronĂŒ|shahahabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahahabnkronĂŒ|goshahahabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahahabronĂŒ|gokishahahabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahahabroshĂ«|shahahabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahahabnkroshĂ«|goshahahabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahahabroshĂ«|gokishahahabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahahabromu|shahahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahahabnkromu|goshahahabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahahabromu|gokishahahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahahabmunĂŒ|shahahabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahahabnkmunĂŒ|goshahahabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahahabmunĂŒ|gokishahahabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahahabmushĂ«|shahahabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahahabnkmushĂ«|goshahahabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahahabmushĂ«|gokishahahabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahahabmuro|shahahabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahahabnkmuro|goshahahabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahahabmuro|gokishahahabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
